---
title: "Pranay Kotasthane"
subtitle: "Policy Analyst | Author | Podcaster"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/Pranay-official.jpeg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://x.com/pranaykotas
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/pranaykotas/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:pranay@takshashila.org.in
---

## About Me

I am a public policy researcher at the [Takshashila Institution](https://takshashila.org.in), where I work on India's public policy puzzles at the intersection of technology, economics, and geopolitics.

I believe in making policy ideas accessible to everyone through writing, teaching, and conversations.

## What I Do

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
### Research & Writing
I write about high-technology geopolitics, Indian public policy, and political economy. My work appears in various publications and on my [blog](blog/).
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
### Teaching
I design and teach courses on public policy, geopolitics, and strategic affairs at the [Takshashila Institution](courses.qmd).
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
### Podcast
I co-host [Puliyabaazi](podcast.qmd), a Hindi-Urdu podcast on policy, economics, and technology.
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
### Newsletter
I co-write *Anticipating the Unintended*, a thoughtletter that break down complex policy issues into digestible insights. [Subscribe here](newsletter.qmd).
:::

:::

```{=html}
<div class="home-search-bar">
  <button class="home-search-trigger" onclick="
    var btn = document.getElementById('quarto-search');
    if (btn) { btn.click(); }
    else {
      var inp = document.querySelector('.aa-DetachedSearchButtonPlaceholder, #quarto-search-input');
      if (inp) inp.focus();
    }
  ">
    <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='16' height='16' fill='currentColor' viewBox='0 0 16 16' style='margin-right:0.5rem;vertical-align:-2px'><path d='M11.742 10.344a6.5 6.5 0 1 0-1.397 1.398h-.001q.044.06.098.115l3.85 3.85a1 1 0 0 0 1.415-1.414l-3.85-3.85a1 1 0 0 0-.115-.099zm-5.242 1.156a5.5 5.5 0 1 1 0-11 5.5 5.5 0 0 1 0 11'/></svg>
    Search posts, op-eds, talks…
  </button>
</div>
```

## Recent Writings

::: {#recent-writings}
:::

```{=html}
<a href="blog/" class="btn btn-outline-primary">View all posts →</a>
```
